title: Quick Shell
shortDescription: Save project folders, discover local git repos, and open them in any terminal from Command Palette.
description:
Quick Shell saves folders you open often and launches them from Command Palette in the terminal you already use.

- Discover local git repositories and add them as workspaces
- Save workspaces with optional home keywords for root-palette search
- Every Windows Terminal and Intelligent Terminal profile on your PC, plus WSL and classic shells
- Optional companion app and dev-server command on open
- Create, edit, favorite, duplicate, import, and export workspaces inside Command Palette
- Undo and redo edits; open elevated when needed

After installing from the Microsoft Store or WinGet, open Command Palette and run "Reload Command Palette Extension", then search for Quick Shell.
